habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Su aguijón transmite veneno por herida que drena Destreza y Constitución.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Poison (Ex) Sting-injury; save Fort DC 13; frequency 1/round for 4 rounds; effect 1d2 Dex and 1 Con; cure 1 save. The save DC is Constitution-based.

fullStatBlock:
CR 1/2
Stingray
N Medium animal
Init +1
Senses blindsense 30 ft., low-light vision; Perception +8
AC 12, touch 11, flat-footed 11 (+1 Dex, +1 natural)
hp 13 (2d8+4)
Fort +5, Ref +4, Will +1
Speed swim 40 ft.
Melee sting +1 (1d4 plus poison)
Space 5 ft.; Reach 5 ft.
Special Abilities Poison (Ex) Sting-injury; save Fort DC 13; frequency 1/round for 4 rounds; effect 1d2 Dex and 1 Con; cure 1 save.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 10, Dex 13, Con 15, Int 1, Wis 13, Cha 2
Base Atk +1; CMB +1; CMD 12
Feats Skill Focus (Perception)
Skills Perception +8, Stealth +5 (+13 in sand or mud), Swim +8
Racial Modifiers +8 Stealth in sand or mud
Environment warm oceans
Organization solitary, pair, or flight (3-12)
Treasure none
Source PFRPG Bestiary 2
